comment.body: Taiwan is not just about TSMC; it has a whole ecosystem of companies, the supply chains related to semiconductors... Also, its geographical location on the First Island Chain is too important (threats to Japan, S.Korea and Asia-Pacific)... The US cannot afford losing it to China. That's why we are seeing that the US is acting around Russia-Ukraine in this weird way... because Putin is holding the China card...

comment.body:
In a rangebound market, if you can’t fade the momentum in time you’ll always be late. That’s why I say you’ve got a better edge on the short-vol side. If you miss a move, it’s smarter to sit it out—your cash doesn’t need to be working 24/7, especially when risk is high.
And when a clear trend’s in place, don’t try to fade it. It won’t make you any smarter—just a less wealthier.
Trading without a solid strategy and understanding is an expensive pastime. Trust me, I know...

And when a clear trend’s in place, don’t try to fade it. It won’t make you any smarter—just a less wealthier.
Trading without a solid strategy and understanding is an expensive pastime. Trust me, I know...
